changeSet.author: system
changeSet.sql: UPDATE actions_config SET config = jsonb_set( config, '{payment_method,config,tiers}', ( SELECT jsonb_agg( (tier - 'lower-limit-exclusive-ha' - 'flat-rate-gbp' - 'rate-per-unit-gbp') || jsonb_build_object( 'lowerLimitExclusiveHa', tier -> 'lower-limit-exclusive-ha', 'flatRateGbp', tier -> 'flat-rate-gbp', 'ratePerUnitGbp', tier -> 'rate-per-unit-gbp' ) ) FROM jsonb_array_elements(config -> 'payment_method' -> 'config' -> 'tiers') AS tier ) ) WHERE is_active = TRUE AND config -> 'payment_method' -> 'config' -> 'tiers' IS NOT NULL;

changeSet.author: system
changeSet.sql: UPDATE actions_config SET config = jsonb_set( config #- '{payment_method,config,new-woodland-max-percent}', '{payment_method,config,newWoodlandMaxPercent}', config -> 'payment_method' -> 'config' -> 'new-woodland-max-percent' ) WHERE is_active = TRUE AND config -> 'payment_method' -> 'config' -> 'new-woodland-max-percent' IS NOT NULL;

changeSet.author: system
changeSet.sql: UPDATE actions_config SET config = jsonb_set( config, '{payment_method,version}', '"1.0.0"' ) WHERE is_active = TRUE AND config -> 'payment_method' IS NOT NULL;
